testsuite.name: com.example.temporal.UserOnboardingWorkflowTest

testcase.name: happy path: full onboarding completes after emailVerified signal
child workflow receives setDepartment signal and completes profile setup
workflow returns AWAITING_VERIFICATION status when email verification times out
getUserId() query returns correct userId at any point
getStatus() returns AWAITING_VERIFICATION while waiting for email signal

testsuite.system-out: 22:11:19.249 [workflow-method-test-onboarding-user-001-23445276-95c6-4035-b385-5e7419eec8e6] INFO c.e.t.w.UserOnboardingWorkflowImpl - Onboarding started for userId=user-001 22:11:19.451 [signal emailVerified] INFO c.e.t.w.UserOnboardingWorkflowImpl - Signal received: emailVerified for userId=user-001, token=token-abc-123 22:11:19.451 [Activity Executor taskQueue="user-onboarding-queue", namespace="default": 1] INFO c.e.t.activity.UserActivitiesImpl - Validating user: userId=user-001, email=alice@example.com 22:11:19.451 [Activity Executor taskQueue="user-onboarding-queue", namespace="default": 1] INFO c.e.t.activity.UserActivitiesImpl - User validation passed for userId=user-001 22:11:19.482 [Activity Executor taskQueue="user-onboarding-queue", namespace="default": 1] INFO c.e.t.activity.UserActivitiesImpl - Sending welcome email to Alice Smith <alice@example.com> 22:11:19.482 [Activity Executor taskQueue="user-onboarding-queue", namespace="default": 1] INFO c.e.t.activity.UserActivitiesImpl - Welcome email sent to alice@example.com 22:11:19.482 [workflow-method-test-onboarding-user-001-23445276-95c6-4035-b385-5e7419eec8e6] INFO c.e.t.w.UserOnboardingWorkflowImpl - Waiting for emailVerified signal (max 24h) for userId=user-001 22:11:19.513 [workflow-method-test-onboarding-user-001-23445276-95c6-4035-b385-5e7419eec8e6] INFO c.e.t.w.UserOnboardingWorkflowImpl - Email verified for userId=user-001, token=token-abc-123 22:11:19.544 [workflow-method-test-onboarding-user-001-23445276-95c6-4035-b385-5e7419eec8e6] INFO c.e.t.w.UserOnboardingWorkflowImpl - Child workflow started. Sending setDepartment signal. 22:11:19.590 [workflow-method-8f2a34ad-47c5-3c86-83b3-4a1c5a5a13e4-a5b5f23a-7e69-46f6-bf71-cb05ed4bb5f3] INFO c.e.t.w.ProfileSetupChildWorkflowImpl - Child workflow started for userId=user-001 22:11:19.622 [signal setDepartment] INFO c.e.t.w.ProfileSetupChildWorkflowImpl - Signal received: setDepartment=Engineering 22:11:19.622 [workflow-method-8f2a34ad-47c5-3c86-83b3-4a1c5a5a13e4-a5b5f23a-7e69-46f6-bf71-cb05ed4bb5f3] INFO c.e.t.w.ProfileSetupChildWorkflowImpl - Department received: Engineering.
